ab: kanini na kasede’an, marelran ku kani valri na vavayan mukuwa i valangaw mudadangiya kani ama na maralrak kani malri.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: kemay Tayhok muicas mi da kissiya mukuwa i Valangaw.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去臺東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: meredek mi i Valangaw, i ama na maralrak kani malri midusiya duwa puicasa kaniyam.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: adi adawilr na ēki kanantu ruma’ ni ama. nu midusiya ta dika meredek ta lra.
ch: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，若開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle's house, and it's just a short drive away.

ab: kantu ’udar ni ama mu, ulra a ma’idang na puwarikanan, marelrang mi midinsiya mukuwa kanidu na puwarikanan.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到那個牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle's house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: kadu i puwarikanan mu, tu adayaw mi i ama pakan kana takulris di tu puicasaw mi kana uma.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊又讓我們騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: nu ’aremeng, marelrang mi mukuwa mekana i maci.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: alra sadu na dusiya i maci, semalra miotabay mi mukuwa kadu.
ch: 因為市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: yavuruk mi mu, mena’u mi lra da kicakaw lra naniyam otobay. muicas mi lra kana bas muruma’.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車回家。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: muruma’ mi lra i Tayhok harem di, nantu otobay ni ama mu, muacevung lra nay?
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don't know if my uncle's motorcycle has been found.
